nasb.text: and I fell to the ground and heard a voice saying to me, ‘Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting Me?’

esv.text: And I fell to the ground and heard a voice saying to me, ‘Saul, Saul, why are you persecuting me?’

cnv.text: 我仆倒在地上，聽見有聲音對我說：‘掃羅，掃羅，你為甚麼迫害我？’

ccb.text: 我就扑倒在地，听见有声音对我说，‘扫罗！扫罗！你为什么迫害我？’

csbs.text: 我就仆倒在地上，听见有声音对我说：‘扫罗，扫罗！你为什么逼迫我？’
